{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = alchemy (The Elder Empire: Sea)
| introduced = Of Kings and Killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Bliss]] was poisoned by alchemy.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
